title: Prevent VSCE icon rejection by using compatible extension icon format

source.subject: fix(vscode): avoid vsce rejecting SVG favicon as icon

body:
Replaces SVG favicon extension icon with a **VSCE-compatible** format to avoid publish rejection.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`88fa986`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/88fa986)
- **Subject:** fix(vscode): avoid vsce rejecting SVG favicon as icon
- **Completed:** 2026-04-21

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `editor-extension`
- **Deliverable:** `v01-open-vsx`

## Relation
Packaging fix for **v01-open-vsx**.
